title: 10 best herbal teas for esophagus health
intro: Herbal teas can be a soothing and beneficial choice for maintaining esophagus health. Two noteworthy options are chamomile and slippery elm tea. Chamomile tea has anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce irritation in the esophagus, making it a comforting choice for those with acid reflux or inflammation. Slippery elm tea, on the other hand, creates a protective barrier in the digestive tract, which may help prevent esophageal irritation. Both teas can be enjoyed regularly and provide additional health benefits, such as improved sleep quality and stress reduction. However, it's essential to consult a healthcare professional if you have any concerns about your esophageal health or experience persistent symptoms.
